comment.text: This is a placeholder text for an input field. It prompts the user to enter a name, such as for an AI provider or a header.

usage.context:
<TextInput
 type={InputType.text}
 size={InputSize.base}
 value={headerNames[index]}
 onChange={(e) => onChangeHeaderName(index, e.target.value)}
 placeholder={t("AISettings:EnterLabel")}
 scale
 hasError={needReset && !headerNames[index] && index === 0}
 testId="mcp-header-name-input"
 />
 </FieldContainer>
